text:
Automation will get you banned." That’s what I used to think too.

Then I learned the official Meta Threads API exists. No browser hacks. No shady scripts. Just clean, authorized automation.

One setup. Free tools. It posts daily, reads its own analytics, and writes better tomorrow. Tokens refresh themselves. Zero maintenance.

This account? Run entirely by that system. You’re reading a post it wrote right now.

The myth is dead. The API is the way.
